__description__.metadata: Rock parameters (radius, density, albedo, water fraction, porosity, U/Th/K content, etc.).
__description__.records: List of radiation records for this rock type, grouped by simulation run and time step.

record_fields.step_index: Time-step index within the given run.
record_fields.uv_local_flux: UV flux at the microbe location [W/m^2].
record_fields.gcr_local_flux: Cosmic ray flux at the microbe location.
record_fields.gamma_local_flux: Gamma-ray dose rate at the microbe location [Gy/year].
record_fields.cumulative_exposure: Cumulative exposure at the rock center [J/m^2] (all components).
record_fields.distance_au: Distance of the rock from the nearest star [AU].
record_fields.nearest_star_index: Index of the nearest star in the simulation.
record_fields.T_surface_K: Equilibrium temperature at the rock surface [K].
record_fields.T_mid_radius_K: Temperature at half the rock radius [K].
record_fields.T_center_K: Temperature at the rock center (microbe location) [K].
record_fields.population_fraction: Current surviving fraction of the initial microbe population for this rock type (0–1).
